channel.title: IDM on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in IDM on Tech Tracker

item.title: 1DM - fastest music, video, torrent, download manager for android !
item.description: **<img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-U7gP_WUUgAc/X9z7EHBxbaI/AAAAAAAACVk/s6nvnaz5zlURE81ahrWruseq3Vy3MpoawCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1608317708116203-0.png" alt=""> ** 1DM ( formerly IDM ) by Indian developer is the most powerful download manager available for android on playstore right now. A few years back when 1DM not available Android users have no choice other than to depend on pc’s softwares like internet download manager which consists of all the required features and for those who doesn’t have a laptop or PC have to use android which is trouble maker because android have to depend on browsers to download files.
